name: MedDRA Hierarchy Provider
description: Provides hierarchical MedDRA ontology autocomplete with cascading filtered search. Each level (SOC, HLGT, HLT, PT, LLT) filters based on the parent field selection. Load your MedDRA .asc files and get 5 clean autocomplete fields with true hierarchy filtering.

system-settings.name:
MedDRA Data Directory Path
Absolute path to the folder containing MedDRA .asc files (soc.asc, hlgt.asc, hlt.asc, pt.asc, llt.asc, soc_hlgt.asc, hlgt_hlt.asc, hlt_pt.asc) on the REDCap server.
Example: /var/meddra/MedAscii

Cache File Path
Path where the module will write a JSON cache for fast lookups. The web server must have write permission.
Example: /var/meddra/meddra_cache.json

MedDRA Version Label
e.g. '27.1' — shown in the Online Designer when selecting this ontology

action-tags.description:
Liên kết trường con MedDRA với trường cha. Dùng cú pháp: @MEDDRA_PARENT=tên_trường_cha
Ví dụ: Trường HLGT thêm @MEDDRA_PARENT=meddra_soc để lọc theo SOC đã chọn.
